name: Network Connections
description: Detects network connections via Windows Filtering Platform (WFP) audit events and Sysmon. WFP events require 'Audit Filtering Platform Connection' policy. Sysmon Event 3 is the richest source — includes process, direction, DNS name, and both IPs/ports.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.3: Sysmon: Network connection — Image, User, Protocol, SourceIp, SourcePort, DestinationIp, DestinationPort, DestinationHostname, Initiated (true=outbound)
event_descriptions.5031: Windows Firewall Service blocked an application from accepting incoming connections
event_descriptions.5154: Windows Filtering Platform: application/service listened on a port
event_descriptions.5155: WFP blocked an application/service from listening on a port
event_descriptions.5156: WFP permitted a connection — SourceAddress, DestAddress, SourcePort, DestPort, Protocol, ProcessID
event_descriptions.5157: WFP blocked a connection — same fields as 5156
event_descriptions.5158: WFP permitted a bind to local port
event_descriptions.5159: WFP blocked a bind to local port
